# Withings MCP
Unofficial local-first Withings MCP server for AI body composition, sleep, ECG and blood pressure agents.
Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/withingsmcp
Homepage: https://wellness.delx.ai/connectors/withings
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/withings-mcp-unofficial
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=withings-mcp-unofficial -- withings-mcp-server doctor
MCP command: withings-mcp-server

- MCP registry name: io.github.davidmosiah/withingsmcp
- Start agents with withings_connection_status and withings_data_inventory before any data tool.
- Read-only default tools: withings_agent_manifest, withings_capabilities, withings_privacy_audit, withings_connection_status, withings_data_inventory, withings_daily_summary, withings_weekly_summary, withings_cache_status.
- For large body-measure histories, use withings_list_body_measures with ISO 8601 after/before and a small limit. The server converts the window to Withings startdate/enddate and caps returned records.
- OAuth env: WITHINGS_CLIENT_ID, WITHINGS_CLIENT_SECRET, WITHINGS_REDIRECT_URI.
- Optional env: WITHINGS_TOKEN_PATH (token storage path), WITHINGS_PRIVACY_MODE (summary|structured|raw, default structured), WITHINGS_CACHE (true|sqlite to enable), WITHINGS_CACHE_PATH.
- Prefer JSON responses for automation and markdown responses for human summaries.
- Tokens stay local under ~/.withingsmcp/tokens.json (or equivalent) and should never be printed.
- Not medical advice. Use as trend context only — outputs are operational context, not medical, legal or financial advice.
